tip: Against Shen, primarily reserve your E (Apprehend) to interrupt his E (Shadow Dash) taunt. This counter-engage is critical, not only stopping his initiation but also preventing his disengage, allowing you to secure immediate Hemorrhage stacks and initiate a decisive all-in with Decimate. Avoid extended trades if his W (Spirit's Refuge) is active and he has empowered Q (Twilight Assault) to avoid unnecessary damage mitigation.
